item.title: A real-life Kraken stalked the seas of the late Cretaceous
item.description: Researchers discovered evidence of enormous Kraken-like creatures who hunted in the seas some 100 million years ago, competing with large apex predato...

item.title: Justice Department drops probe into Fed Chair Jerome Powell
item.description: The move paves the way for the Senate to confirm Kevin Warsh, the president's nominee to head the central bank.

item.title: Decades-old, newly restored Smithsonian carousel reopens — to children's delight
item.description: The carousel was first desegregated when part of Gwynn Oak Amusement Park outside Baltimore in 1963. It was moved to the National Mall after the park ...

item.title: How Pittsburgh — host of this year's NFL draft — became a sports mecca
item.description: The Pennsylvania city is hosting the draft for the first time in almost 80 years. Pittsburghers say the city's passionate fanbases and winning teams m...

item.title: Kushner and U.S. envoy Witkoff will head to Pakistan for new Iran talks
item.description: Iran's foreign minister arrived in Islamabad, and the White House says Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner will go there Saturday to try to "move the ball...
